value.rootCause: Pre-flight cabin equipment serviceability checks did not reconcile the PBE position with the deferred defect list.
value.correctiveAction: Replace or service the affected PBE, update the cabin defect record, and confirm serviceability before release.
value.preventiveAction: Add a supervisor review of emergency equipment checks and monthly sampling of PBE serviceability records.

latestReview.commentToAuditee: CAP accepted. Submit the required PBE serviceability record.
latestReview.internalCaaNote: CAP actions are credible; Evidence verification remains required.
